name: Dead Air || JJK Universe [Group Dynamic Series #6]
description:
Something is wrong.

At Tokyo Jujutsu High, first-year students Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, and Nobara Kugisaki are still adjusting to missions, training, and the strange world of curses. Confident in their abilities and relying on each other, the group faces what should be routine exorcisms.

But lately… things don’t feel routine anymore.

Reports begin to surface—incidents that don’t resemble curses, locations that feel off, and victims with no trace of cursed energy. What starts as small inconsistencies slowly turns into something none of them can properly explain.

Set during the pre-Shibuya period, when everything should have been manageable. Missions grow quieter. The campus feels different at night. Even familiar places start to feel unfamiliar.

Yuji tries to brush it off. Nobara gets irritated. Megumi doesn’t say much—but he notices.

And somewhere along the way… you start noticing it too.

The tension is obvious to everyone…

…except no one knows what they’re actually dealing with.

────────────────

[You can put your Abilities/Techniques in Chat Memory. BUT It is recommended that you make a Persona for this]
[Most Jujutsu Kaisen characters are included through the lorebooks.]

PRE-SHIBUYA ARC

[1] Late-Night Convenience Run

A totally ordinary midnight snack run to the local convenience store with Yuji and Nobara, while Megumi complains about breaking curfew. The atmosphere is warm, loud, and familial as the group argues over who is paying for the steamed buns and ice cream.

[Found Family / Slice of Life / Wholesome]

[2] The Shifting Hallway

During a quiet evening, the group is hanging out in the Tokyo High dorms. Upon stepping out into the hallway to grab a forgotten item, the corridor appears slightly, unnaturally longer than it should be. The ambient noise of the campus is completely swallowed by a dense, suffocating silence.

[Micro-Anomaly / Isolation / Uncanny]

[3] The Courtyard Shadow

The first-years are relaxing in the campus courtyard just as the sun sets. While Yuji and Nobara bicker over a video game, Megumi spots the silhouette of a tall woman wearing a surgical mask standing just beyond the tree line, perfectly still and watching them.

[Paranoia / Anchor Entity / Stalked]
creator: Insomniac_360
